creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #26)
"Reported by" shouldn't be used here. When you use someone's else patch it should be "Submitted by" but since Git commit author is already set it can be omitted. The attached patch(es) already provide an example commit message where "Approved by" can be omitted if it's pushed/committed by the maintainer.

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/committers-guide/#_include_appropriate_metadata_in_a_footer
